name: US Cobalt Inc.
description: US Cobalt Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of high-grade cobalt deposits, which are essential components for power storage solutions such as lithium-ion batteries used in electric vehicles and consumer electronics. The company's primary assets are strategically located in Idaho, Utah, and Alberta. US Cobalt Inc. is dedicated to advancing these critical metal projects to support the growing demand for energy storage technologies. The company was headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, before being acquired by First Cobalt Corp. in 2018.
